예레미야애가 3:1.content: I am the man who has seen affliction by the rod of his wrath.

예레미야애가 3:2.content: He has led me and caused me to walk in darkness, and not in light.

예레미야애가 3:3.content: Surely he turns his hand against me again and again all day long.

예레미야애가 3:4.content: He has made my flesh and my skin old. He has broken my bones.

예레미야애가 3:5.content: He has built against me, and surrounded me with bitterness and hardship.

예레미야애가 3:6.content: He has made me dwell in dark places, as those who have been long dead.

예레미야애가 3:7.content: He has walled me about, so that I can’t go out. He has made my chain heavy.

예레미야애가 3:8.content: Yes, when I cry, and call for help, he shuts out my prayer.

예레미야애가 3:9.content: He has walled up my ways with cut stone. He has made my paths crooked.

예레미야애가 3:10.content: He is to me as a bear lying in wait, as a lion in secret places.

예레미야애가 3:11.content: He has turned away my ways, and pulled me in pieces. He has made me desolate.

예레미야애가 3:12.content: He has bent his bow, and set me as a mark for the arrow.

예레미야애가 3:13.content: He has caused the shafts of his quiver to enter into my kidneys.

예레미야애가 3:14.content: I have become a derision to all my people, and their song all day long.

예레미야애가 3:15.content: He has filled me with bitterness. He has stuffed me with wormwood.

예레미야애가 3:16.content: He has also broken my teeth with gravel. He has covered me with ashes.

예레미야애가 3:17.content: You have removed my soul far away from peace. I forgot prosperity.

예레미야애가 3:18.content: I said, “My strength has perished, along with my expectation from Yahweh.”

예레미야애가 3:19.content: Remember my affliction and my misery, the wormwood and the bitterness.

예레미야애가 3:20.content: My soul still remembers them, and is bowed down within me.

예레미야애가 3:21.content: This I recall to my mind; therefore I have hope.

예레미야애가 3:22.content: It is because of Yahweh’s loving kindnesses that we are not consumed, because his compassion doesn’t fail.

예레미야애가 3:23.content: They are new every morning. Great is your faithfulness.

예레미야애가 3:24.content: “Yahweh is my portion,” says my soul. “Therefore I will hope in him.”

예레미야애가 3:25.content: Yahweh is good to those who wait for him, to the soul who seeks him.

예레미야애가 3:26.content: It is good that a man should hope and quietly wait for the salvation of Yahweh.

예레미야애가 3:27.content: It is good for a man that he bear the yoke in his youth.

예레미야애가 3:28.content: Let him sit alone and keep silence, because he has laid it on him.

예레미야애가 3:29.content: Let him put his mouth in the dust, if it is so that there may be hope.

예레미야애가 3:30.content: Let him give his cheek to him who strikes him. Let him be filled full of reproach.

예레미야애가 3:31.content: For the Lord will not cast off forever.

예레미야애가 3:32.content: For though he causes grief, yet he will have compassion according to the multitude of his loving kindnesses.

예레미야애가 3:33.content: For he does not afflict willingly, nor grieve the children of men.

예레미야애가 3:34.content: To crush under foot all the prisoners of the earth,

예레미야애가 3:35.content: to turn away the right of a man before the face of the Most High,

예레미야애가 3:36.content: to subvert a man in his cause, the Lord doesn’t approve.

예레미야애가 3:37.content: Who is he who says, and it comes to pass, when the Lord doesn’t command it?

예레미야애가 3:38.content: Doesn’t evil and good come out of the mouth of the Most High?

예레미야애가 3:39.content: Why does a living man complain, a man for the punishment of his sins?

예레미야애가 3:40.content: Let us search and try our ways, and turn again to Yahweh.

예레미야애가 3:41.content: Let’s lift up our heart with our hands to God in the heavens.

예레미야애가 3:42.content: “We have transgressed and have rebelled. You have not pardoned.

예레미야애가 3:43.content: “You have covered us with anger and pursued us. You have killed. You have not pitied.

예레미야애가 3:44.content: You have covered yourself with a cloud, so that no prayer can pass through.

예레미야애가 3:45.content: You have made us an off-scouring and refuse in the middle of the peoples.

예레미야애가 3:46.content: “All our enemies have opened their mouth wide against us.

예레미야애가 3:47.content: Terror and the pit have come on us, devastation and destruction.”

예레미야애가 3:48.content: My eye runs down with streams of water, for the destruction of the daughter of my people.

예레미야애가 3:49.content: My eye pours down and doesn’t cease, without any intermission,

예레미야애가 3:50.content: until Yahweh looks down, and sees from heaven.

예레미야애가 3:51.content: My eye affects my soul, because of all the daughters of my city.

예레미야애가 3:52.content: They have chased me relentlessly like a bird, those who are my enemies without cause.

예레미야애가 3:53.content: They have cut off my life in the dungeon, and have cast a stone on me.

예레미야애가 3:54.content: Waters flowed over my head. I said, “I am cut off.”

예레미야애가 3:55.content: I called on your name, Yahweh, out of the lowest dungeon.

예레미야애가 3:56.content: You heard my voice: “Don’t hide your ear from my sighing, and my cry.”

예레미야애가 3:57.content: You came near in the day that I called on you. You said, “Don’t be afraid.”

예레미야애가 3:58.content: Lord, you have pleaded the causes of my soul. You have redeemed my life.

예레미야애가 3:59.content: Yahweh, you have seen my wrong. Judge my cause.

예레미야애가 3:60.content: You have seen all their vengeance and all their plans against me.

예레미야애가 3:61.content: You have heard their reproach, Yahweh, and all their plans against me,

예레미야애가 3:62.content: the lips of those that rose up against me, and their plots against me all day long.

예레미야애가 3:63.content: You see their sitting down and their rising up. I am their song.

예레미야애가 3:64.content: You will pay them back, Yahweh, according to the work of their hands.

예레미야애가 3:65.content: You will give them hardness of heart, your curse to them.

예레미야애가 3:66.content: You will pursue them in anger, and destroy them from under the heavens of Yahweh.
